title: vriesea duvaliana
intro: Vriesea duvaliana, also known as Tiger's Jaw or Duval's Air Plant, is a species of epiphytic bromeliad plant, which is a type of flowering plant that grows on other surfaces such as trees or rocks, without deriving nutrients from them. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which are thought to be due to the presence of flavonoids and phenolic compounds. The health benefits of Vriesea duvaliana are believed to include reducing inflammation, improving respiratory health, and boosting the immune system, although more research is needed to confirm these effects. Herbal preparations of Vriesea duvaliana have been used to make teas, infusions, and topical creams, although its use should be under the guidance of a healthcare professional due to potential interactions with other medications.
